caption: The video features a split-screen news broadcast from "PLUS POLITICS." On the left side of the screen, a man wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and tie speaks while gesturing with his hands. Behind him is a blue digital backdrop with the words "PLUS POLITICS" and a circular graphic. On the right side of the screen, a man wearing a red kufi cap and a dark patterned garment is shown in a close-up shot against a plain wall. A purple and blue logo is visible in the top left corner of each scene. A banner across the bottom of the screen displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Further down, the text "WATCH ONLINE" is paired with the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" in the top sequence, while the bottom sequence replaces this with "SUBSCRIBE" and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." The men's facial expressions and hand positions shift slightly as the clip progresses.
